name: @ts-doctor/rules-exhaustiveness-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-doctor's `exhaustiveness` rule category (RULE-025): 3 SYN AST predicates (default-case-last, no-constant-condition, prefer-discriminated-union) + 5 TYP type-aware predicates (no-for-in-array, no-unnecessary-boolean-literal-compare, no-unnecessary-condition, prefer-nullish-coalescing, switch-exhaustiveness-check). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @ts-doctor/rules-core-effect for the rule substrate (defineRule/runRule/runTypeAwareRule/Rule/RuleContext) and @ts-doctor/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contracts. Plain-TS AST predicates wrapping the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (visitors are sync). Preserves RULE-016 (discriminated-union ≥2-arm same-discriminant threshold) and the RULE-025 switch-exhaustiveness false-negative bias (bails on non-literal member or a `default` clause) verbatim.
